commands.review_summary:
The PR hardens channel message action discovery against unreadable plugin-returned discovery fields and adds regression coverage for schema-property and scoped-action-list failures.

PR surface: Source +118, Tests +93. Total +211 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main catches describeMessageTool itself but then directly reads returned discovery and schema fields, so a plugin-returned throwing getter can still escape during message-tool schema/action discovery. I did not run tests because this review was read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining action is maintainer review and broad validation for a maintainer-labeled draft PR; I did not find a narrow automated repair to queue.

target.title: fix(channels): harden message action schema discovery
target.body:
## Summary
- Harden channel message action discovery against plugin-returned getters/proxies that throw while reading discovery fields.
- Keep cross-channel message actions conservative when current-channel schema action lists are unreadable, and skip unreadable schema properties without dropping later healthy schema fragments.
- Add regressions for unreadable schema properties and scoped action lists.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/channels/plugins/message-actions.test.ts -- --reporter=dot`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/channels/plugins/message-action-discovery.ts src/channels/plugins/message-actions.test.ts`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxlint src/channels/plugins/message-action-discovery.ts src/channels/plugins/message-actions.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: malformed channel plugin `describeMessageTool` schema fragments can no longer crash message-tool schema/action discovery through throwing getters.
Real environment tested: local sparse OpenClaw worktree on branch `fuzz-tool-schema-next34-20260602`.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/channels/plugins/message-actions.test.ts -- --reporter=dot`.
Evidence after fix: the focused channel plugin message-action test file passed with 12 tests, including regressions for unreadable schema properties and unreadable scoped action lists.
Observed result after fix: unreadable schema properties are logged and skipped while healthy schema fields remain available; unreadable current-channel scoped action lists fail closed for cross-channel action discovery.
What was not tested: broad `pnpm check:changed` is pending remote proof after PR creation.
target.author: vincentkoc
